qry:define.declare: <FILTER oi_carpeta="" d_tarea="" f_tarea_d="20120202" f_tarea_h="20130202" oi_estado_tarea="" oi_tipo_tarea="" oi_clasif_sujeto="" d_lugar_tarea="" f_vto_tarea_desde="" f_vto_tarea_hasta="" rol="" />
qry:define.name: COUNT

qry:select.name: sql1

qry:define.declare: <FILTER oi_carpeta="" d_tarea="" f_tarea_d="" f_tarea_h="" oi_estado_tarea="" oi_tipo_tarea="" oi_clasif_sujeto="" d_lugar_tarea="" f_vto_tarea_desde="" f_vto_tarea_hasta="" rol="USER" />
qry:define.name: FILTER

qry:select.name: sql1
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT t0.oi_tarea as oi_tarea, t0.d_tarea as d_tarea, t0.f_tarea as f_tarea, t0.d_lugar_tarea as d_lugar_tarea, t0.f_vto_tarea as f_vto_tarea, t0.oi_tarea as CODE, t0.d_tarea as TEXT, t0.oi_carpeta as oi_carpeta, t0.oi_estado_tarea as oi_estado_tarea, t0.oi_tipo_tarea as oi_tipo_tarea, t0.oi_clasif_sujeto as oi_clasif_sujeto, t0.f_alta as f_alta, E.c_empresa, E.d_empresa, C.c_carpeta, C.d_carpeta
FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as E, LEG01_CARPETAS as C, LEG03_TAREAS as t0
JOIN C.oi_empresa INNER E.oi_empresa, C.oi_carpeta INNER t0.oi_carpeta
WHERE
C.oi_estado_carpeta != 11
{%?(string(#PARAM:ROW/@id)!='') {% AND t0.oi_tarea IN ({%=string(#PARAM:ROW/@id)%}) %} {% AND t0.oi_tarea IN (0) %} %}
ORDER BY oi_tarea asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CLA.d_clasif_suj, SUJ.d_sujeto FROM LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ as CSU, LEG40_SUJETOS as SUJ, LEG41_CLASIF as CLA JOIN CSU.oi_sujeto INNER SUJ.oi_sujeto, CSU.oi_clasif_suj INNER CLA.oi_clasif_suj WHERE CSU.oi_clasif_sujeto = {#PARAM:@oi_clasif_sujeto} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <TAREA descr="[103] reunion de concil." f_vto_tarea="20120531120000" d_lugar_tarea="qweqweqweqweqweqweqweqe" f_tarea="20120530105153" d_tarea="reunion de concil." id="108" o_tarea=""> <oi_carpeta value="112" nmd-agr="1" /> <oi_estado_tarea value="1" nmd-agr="1" /> <oi_tipo_tarea value="1" nmd-agr="1" /> <oi_clasif_sujeto value="1" nmd-agr="1" /> </TAREA>
qry:define.name: FILTER_DOCS

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ld.oi_documento, ld.f_doc_dig FROM LEG03_TAREAS as t0, LEG05_DOCUMENTOS as ld JOIN t0.oi_tarea INNER ld.oi_tarea WHERE t0.oi_tarea = {#PARAM:@id} ORDER BY f_doc_dig desc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <TAREA descr="[108] test test test" o_tarea="fdsafasfas" f_vto_tarea="20120613152800" d_lugar_tarea="asdasdasdasd" f_tarea="20120613" d_tarea="test test test" id="108"> <oi_carpeta value="112" nmd-agr="1" /> <oi_estado_tarea value="4" nmd-agr="1" /> <oi_tipo_tarea value="3" nmd-agr="1" /> <oi_clasif_sujeto value="1" nmd-agr="1" /> </TAREA>
qry:define.name: LISTDOC

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ld.oi_documento, ld.d_doc_dig, ld.f_doc_dig, ld.o_doc_dig, ld.oi_doc_digital, ld.oi_carpeta, ld.oi_tarea, lt.d_tarea, lc.d_carpeta, ldd.o_doc_digital FROM LEG03_TAREAS as lt, LEG05_DOCUMENTOS as ld, LEG01_CARPETAS as lc, LEG37_DOC_DIGITAL as ldd JOIN lt.oi_tarea INNER ld.oi_tarea, ld.oi_doc_digital INNER ldd.oi_doc_digital, lt.oi_carpeta INNER lc.oi_carpeta WHERE lt.oi_tarea = {#PARAM:@id} ORDER BY f_doc_dig desc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <TAREA descr="[103] reunion de concil." f_vto_tarea="20120531120000" d_lugar_tarea="qweqweqweqweqweqweqweqe" f_tarea="20120530105153" d_tarea="reunion de concil." id="108" o_tarea=""> <oi_carpeta value="112" nmd-agr="1" /> <oi_estado_tarea value="1" nmd-agr="1" /> <oi_tipo_tarea value="1" nmd-agr="1" /> <oi_clasif_sujeto value="1" nmd-agr="1" /> </TAREA>
qry:define.name: CANT_DOCS

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT COUNT(ld.oi_documento) as CANT FROM LEG03_TAREAS as t0, LEG05_DOCUMENTOS as ld JOIN t0.oi_tarea INNER ld.oi_tarea WHERE t0.oi_tarea = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_tipo_tarea
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT LEG03_TAREAS.oi_estado_tarea, LEG03_TAREAS.oi_tarea, LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS.c_tipo_tarea
FROM LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS, LEG03_TAREAS
JOIN LEG03_TAREAS.oi_tipo_tarea INNER LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS.oi_tipo_tarea
WHERE LEG03_TAREAS.oi_tarea = {#PARAM:@oi_tarea}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_oicarpeta
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT C.oi_carpeta FROM LEG01_CARPETAS as C, LEG03_TAREAS as T JOIN T.oi_carpeta INNER C.oi_carpeta WHERE T.oi_tarea = {#PARAM:@oi_tarea} ')/ROWS/ROW
